description: Polish current VinylPod widgets against the right-side reference app: dynamic island first, then typography, progress placement, menu visibility, and album-aware liquid glass.

identity.target_font: SF Pro / SF Pro Rounded-style native Apple sans
identity.primary_accent_color: dynamic from album artwork via ArtworkColorExtractor
identity.background_mood: smoky adaptive liquid glass over the user's desktop wallpaper

layout.dynamic_island_anchor: top-center of the main screen at the menu bar/notch line
layout.progress_bar_shift: large widget progress cluster moved upward by reducing title/control spacers
layout.settings_menu: taller album-tinted smoky glass popover with high-contrast white text

Dynamic_Island_Surface.notes: Added independent compact/expanded top-center dynamic island panel with visible settings trigger and animated equalizer bars.

Target_Font_Replacement.notes: Theme typography now uses native SF Pro-like bold/semibold weights matching the reference's Apple UI text feel.

Progress_Bar_Shift_Up.notes: Large widget progress/control group moved upward to match the target app's tighter vertical rhythm.

Global_Settings_Visibility.notes: Settings trigger now defaults to a dark high-contrast capsule and the menu uses white ink.

Expanded_Settings_Menu_Layout.notes: Settings popover widened and max height increased to avoid the cut-off look.

Dynamic_Album_Glass_Engine.notes: Existing album-art color extraction now visibly feeds the floating widgets, settings menu, desktop background, and dynamic island glass wash. Idle state uses the uploaded ice mountain as the fallback art and a cool blue fallback accent.

Uploaded_Ice_Mountain_Idle_Artwork.notes: The uploaded majestic ice mountain image is packaged as a SwiftPM resource and displayed anywhere the app has no current track artwork.

Liquid_Glass_Depth_Pass.notes: Shared widget glass now uses blur, darker inner depth, album/ice edge refraction, a soft white specular streak, and a stronger bottom shade.
